overview: SaveFuture AI is a premium fintech SaaS app that helps people save money, plan their career, and build a 10-12 year financial growth roadmap. It combines personalized savings plans, career guidance, business idea suggestions, and education roadmaps into one cohesive platform.
features: Personalized savings dashboard with income/expense tracking and saving targets
AI-powered budget suggestions and expense reduction recommendations
Career guidance for students after 10th, 12th, and graduation with salary and growth data
Business idea generator with basic, medium, and advanced level suggestions
10-12 year visual life plan roadmap with year-by-year milestones
Education roadmap with stream/course suggestions and expected salary
Premium subscription plans with Stripe checkout (₹99/mo, ₹799/yr, ₹1999 lifetime)
Admin dashboard with user stats, revenue, and popular content
Mobile-first responsive design with bottom navigation
